---
title: "AI, Decomputing and the Interregnum"
author: "Dan McQuillan"
date: "2026-03-08"
date-added: "2026-04-15"
categories: [AI, technology-critique, politics, decomputing, preprint]
status: to-read
url: "https://www.danmcquillan.org/ai_decomputing_interregnum.html"
---

Preprint exploring AI, decomputing, and the political concept of the interregnum — when the old world is dying and the new one cannot yet be born.

[Read the full article →](https://www.danmcquillan.org/ai_decomputing_interregnum.html)
